name: demo-claims-appeals-minio-example
description: GTM demo (Mode A): batch run+seal over a fan-out of denied insurance claims → drafted appeals → tamper-detecting audit bundle stored in MinIO/S3. Domain-flavored reskin of offload-minio with claims-appeals fixtures.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --strict test/claims-appeals-minio.test.ts test/recording-bundle.test.ts
